ai.combinedRangeNote: Combined buy range from both analysts

buffett.tooltip: Seeks businesses with durable moats to buy at fair prices and hold forever
buffett.philosophy: Seek companies with durable competitive moats at fair prices and hold them for decades. Focus on ROE, free cash flow, and management integrity, always maintaining a margin of safety.
achievements: Berkshire Hathaway — ~20% annual return sustained for 50+ years
Successful investments in Coca-Cola, American Express, and Apple
Net worth exceeds $120B, multiple-time world's richest person

lynch.tooltip: Uncovers 10-bagger growth stocks using the PEG ratio before Wall Street notices
lynch.philosophy: Find fast-growing companies with PEG ratios below 1.0 before institutions discover them. Invest in what you know, look for 'tenbaggers', and focus on companies with strong earnings growth potential.
achievements: Managed Fidelity Magellan Fund — 29.2% annual return over 13 years
Best-selling author of 'One Up on Wall Street'
Transformed retail investor thinking with grassroots research approach

wood.tooltip: Bets on 5-year disruptive technology themes with high-conviction, concentrated positions
wood.philosophy: Identify and concentrate on companies driving disruptive innovation across AI, genomics, energy storage, robotics, and fintech. Use a 5-year investment horizon and total addressable market analysis to justify bold, high-conviction positions.
achievements: Early conviction on Tesla when it traded below $20 per share
Pioneer of thematic ETF investing in disruptive technology

burry.tooltip: Identifies overvalued bubbles and hidden risks through deep contrarian research
burry.philosophy: Conduct rigorous bottom-up analysis to identify securities trading far below intrinsic value. Embrace contrarian positions when the market is wrong, focus on downside protection first, and hold unpopular theses with conviction.
achievements: Predicted and profited from the 2008 subprime mortgage crisis (basis of 'The Big Short')
Scion Asset Management delivered exceptional long-term returns
Warned early about multiple market bubbles including tech and housing

dalio.tooltip: Uses debt cycle and geopolitical analysis to navigate macro shifts before they happen
dalio.philosophy: Understand the economic machine through debt cycles, productivity growth, and political shifts. Diversify across uncorrelated assets using an 'All Weather' approach, and use systematic principles to remove emotion from decision-making.
achievements: Founded Bridgewater Associates — world's largest hedge fund ($150B+ AUM)
Author of 'Principles' — bestselling guide to decision-making and life
